mapper.select: SELECT * FROM credit_requirement ORDER BY grade DESC, id DESC
SELECT * FROM credit_requirement WHERE college = #{college} AND grade = #{grade}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO credit_requirement (college, grade, politics_req, humanity_req, innovation_req, social_req) VALUES (#{college}, #{grade}, #{politicsReq}, #{humanityReq}, #{innovationReq}, #{socialReq})
